system.description: Various portals and defenses of the site are protected by combination locks or riddles to solve. Lockpicks will not work against them, though finesse may solve them eventually.
system.additional_info:
Are there a series of combination locks expressing a religious or eccentric worldview? Are there picture arranging puzzles, or unusual "keys" to go in sculpture locks? Are the locks mechanical or supernatural?

Dangers:
• Powerful runic work or enslaved ghosts make the obstacle difficult to smash or trick—the right combination or object must be used to bypass it.
• Clues and needed items are spread across a large estate, or multiple estates.

Remedies:
• The combination or solution to the puzzle is in a scholarly work, and can be found or bought ahead of time.
• The solutions are painfully obvious to someone with the right upbringing and background.
